title: Pyrolirion tubiflorum
taxonomy: Pyrolirion tubiflorum is a genus of flowering plants in the family Gentianaceae. However, it's worth noting that some sources place Pyrolirion tubiflorum as a synonym for Gentiana, which is also a member of the Gentianaceae family. More research is needed to confirm its exact classification. The Gentianaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants, often referred to as the gentian or snapwort family. Further study is required to accurately classify Pyrolirion tubiflorum.
parts: Pyrolirion tubiflorum is not a well-documented plant. However, based on information about the closely related genus Pyrola, the medicinal parts of related species often include the leaves and roots. In these species, the leaves are used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues such as inflammation and digestive problems. The roots are also used to treat conditions like fever and respiratory issues. More research is needed to confirm the specific medicinal properties of Pyrolirion tubiflorum.
